reviews.review_text:
[h1] Attempt at a spoiler-free review [/h1]

I am an avid lethal company player, I try to play as efficiently as possible and minmax wherever possible. The game is clearly not designed with that in mind, and yet it's still fun! The person behind it, Zeekerss, isn't new to game development but this is one of their more 'grounded' titles that they've released. It still retains a silly side.

This game is meant to be played with friends. Yes, there are some very [i] minor [/i] difficulty adjustments for solo play (Mostly surrounding entities that revolve around teamwork and staying close to others), they are insubstantial. If you're more casual it's better off playing with friends. The price tag is misleading because it's not uncommon to hear people buy this game along with a few extra copies for friends.
It's probably impossible to not have been spoiled of the contents of this game if you've been on the internet for the last couple years but if you've somehow not played it yet, find a time and a group of friends for it! I'm sure you'll have a blast, and also a crap in your pants. A little pee too! This game is scary!!!!

This is one of my favourite videogames ever and if you're anything like me, it'll be one of yours too.
Fun game to play with friends, not too scary, relatively skilled gameplay

The game founded its own genre, what else is there to say. Fun gameplay, great art direction, great OST(no kidding). It's dirty cheap, so buy it and have some fun with your friends. Don't really recommend it if you're a solo player, it's not really build around that.

This game needs some QoL for online lobby updates.
You often end up wasting your time trying to connect to invalid games or reconnecting to games where you've been kicked from.

Lethal Company is probably my favorite game of this genre, the art style and vibes are amazing and have infected my mind beyond just playing it.

As of writing the game is still being developed and each time a new update comes out I am filled with joy, it becomes an event in its own right speculating on what will be added every update and each time it is a surprise.

I am confident that this game's ending will be worth it and along with whatever comes next.
Super fun game to play with friends, sometimes spooky, sometimes just chill.

I play this with my brothers and cousins all the time it never stops being hilarious. My favorite part of the game so far is the one time i was playing with my two brothers and my cousin me and my brothers died to a thumper and it was just my cousin left alive he had a shovel and a pro flashlight and a thumper chased him across a gap he made the jump jumped again and proceeded to kill the thumper. Like five minutes later another thumper showed up and tried to kill him he proceeded to kill that one. He found three pieces of scrap went to take it to the ship than made a noise after jumping onto the deck of the ship then a eyeless dog heard him chased him and he died 10/10 game absolutely recommend

start new save, buy pro-flashlight, buy shovel, spend 10 more minutes typing what you want, enter the building, carry things back and forth 4 times, die, lose everything, start over.

that's quite literally a summary of this entire game, if you thought the moons would be exciting they arent because they are just the same 3 copy paste formats
1. forest
2. desert
3. so much snow you cant see ♥♥♥♥ 
these environments hardly change through your entire gameplay and same could be said about the inside of the facility where there are only 2 options, the mansion and the factory both of which are a pain in the ass to move through

the monsters in this game are just as lackluster as the feeling of finishing a quota 
majority of the monsters are either instant death, require more than one person to deal with, or just annoying which makes me really sad because i consistently see such good ideas just to be wasted when the enemy appears, kills you and possibly your entire squad, then leaves. though the most aggravating thing to deal with is the time in this game  unless you have a full squad even 2 runs from and to the ship will land you at 5:00 where on every map means near certain death ESPECIALLY on any desert or forest map 

long review short you could play this game for 20 hours or just 1 and experience all there is to offer, i would say your money is just better spent on R.E.P.O which introduces a lot of fun mechanics and they are also still in development and still so far ahead of whatever this friendslop "horror" game is

Amazing game to play with friends, We just mess around basically the whole time and its extremely fun. Monsters make it difficult so its not always easy. Many mods too from thunderstore that are amazing

Bought this game expecting to collect scrap and make money.
Instead, my friends and I screamed at random objects for 10 minutes because we thought they were monsters.
We made $43 worth of scrap and accumulated approximately $7 million worth of emotional damage.
10/10 workplace environment. The Company values teamwork, sacrifice, and using your friends as bait.
Would get violently chased through a dark facility again.

Good game, it's super fun even with just two people playing, I would recommend mods though as it adds more to the experience. Monsters are scary, atmosphere is on point. It is a bit weirdly optimised so at times on my old computer it ran super slow even though it's not a big game or anything.

Words cannot describe how much i love the "Dine" map because of its cool design and very cool atmosphere, but to be perfectly honest its not abt the maps design is what i love about Dine, its abt how much FEET u can get in just a single visit there, everytime me and my friends go to dine i usually get most profitable because of how much feet i gather, but overall yeah, this game is a must play because u can have chaotic hangouts with ur friends irl or friends online, and MOST importantly visit Dine for the FEET. 

-Flarechecky


I'm gonna be honest, being around Flare is the biggest gamble because he always dies around me like I'm some bad omen. Anyways I tried to 1v1 a butler on Dine, almost won if it wasn't for the lag.

I play this everyday, and all day. I live, I breathe, and I taste Lethal Company. I go to sleep wondering whenever I can play the game again, and I dream of playing Lethal Company again. Yes, play this game, and play you must. It is good, and I relish in the fear I feel whenever the big bads come to hunt me down. Fr though, good game alone, with one friend/partner, and maybe many. I await the next update. The Company® awaits thee....
the funniest and scariest game the best combo ever

very fun game, a lot of mystique in single player, and even multiplayer! even public lobbies can be pretty fun!
   
   Overall, would recommend!

 10/10

I absolutely love this game and it is a whole load of fun (with friends), but there isn't really enough content in the base game to recommend it for more than a few hours of fun. I would absolutely recommend it on a discount, but if you plan on only playing the base game, I don't think there's enough for full price. The modded content, however, really shines, but modding is so unstable that you'll be spending more time debugging and loading than actually playing. If you're willing to put up with it, you'll have some of the best multiplayer moments, ever.

My suggestion to the dev: work with the community to start integrating some of the high-quality mods into the base game. 

I would also really like if there was some additional balance/easy mode for solo play. There are a lot of one shots (which I think are fine, generally, and make for some great moments in co-op) that ultimately make single player not really worth your time.
Needs more content, but great game. Does kinda get repetitive and boring quick, carried by mods, but VERY funny moments with the proximity chat

The combination that this game strikes upon is exciting, and while this game is very rough around the edges, I find its low-res aesthetics charming. This game has fair room for knowledge and skill expression. While I think Lethal Company isn't the final and best form of the new genre it spawned, it's more than worth playing.

one of the best "friendslop" games out there. great atmosphere, gameplay is very fun, good singleplayer, amazing multiplayer. play it with your friends!

great asset, great great asset
amazing multiplayer gmae but if you play alone its kinda boring amazing game tho

Its a pretty good game its a very scary experience solo and with friends it can still be scary but its also much funnier and ridiculous. I think its definitely a game worth much more than 10 bucks maybe 20 would be a better price to be honest either way id definitely recommend it and its also a great place to meet new people and make friends.
idk cool game ig i enjoyed dying more times that i can count and listening to my friends begging for mercy

Refunded the game as I found it overhyped.

Years later I gave it another shot and I kinda wish singleplayer would be better. Oh well, still better than Call of Duty.


This game plays best with friends.
good game just you need to be fine with the ceartor being a frurry and a he takes a long time to update and this game is not fun without a mic/vc it is requad for fun things
really fun and a great game to play with friends highly recomend
The first and to this day, the best friendslop game. The worst part about it is to convince your friend group to play it
its an amazing and really funny game at times, usually its not scary but there r some moments that r actually terrifying

1. going to planet

3. saw a creature
3. ,,aww so cute``
4. dead
yeah good game
Great game. I really get scared on sections of the game and it really sets the mood for scary stuff

Strikes the perfect balance between horror and comedy. Horror because the monsters and overall atmosphere are really dark and effective, producing great moments of fear. I think the Bracken in particular is an absolute gem and, to me, is so good it's an icon. The game is also great at being comedic because its co-op features are very well implemented, particularly with the use of prox chat and walkie-talkies. 

The gameplay loop is simple, but effective in delivering these moments repeatedly. This deserves every bit of popularity it got, and it hasn't even hit full release yet. Talk about lightning in a bottle.
cause u find possible the weirdest party names. have a blast with ur friends. or just troll! this just makes the game peak
lots of randoms and is a totally fun game it wont get too boring

I absolutely love this game. I want it to live forever. Great gameplay, co-op, and lots of scary stuff. What could be better than this atmosphere? Despite the many clones of this game, I think it's still the best of them. I definitely recommend playing it solo or with friends. Besides, the game has a good online community, and you'll definitely find someone to play with if you don't have any friends. Heh.
this game was really fun with friends but without its boring so if you want to buy this game you should have a group of friends that buys it with you
Super fun to play with friends and is perfectly good singleplayer, if a little difficult. Runs great on my ♥♥♥♥♥♥ PC, and absolutely clears the friendslop garbage people play now.
For me it's the best horror coop game of its genre. Simple. Scary. Fun.
absolute comedy and super fun to play with friends!
It's a pretty good game for everyone. With the right people, I feel it can be pretty relaxing too.
Best game to introduce people to gamming, 100% recommend the experience
it is fun to play with your friends or others and set goals and challenges and die in funny ways

👍 Recommended
🕒 10.0 hours on record  

Lethal Company is a hilarious and chaotic co-op horror game that shines brightest when played with friends. With 10.0 hours on record, I had a lot of fun, but I completely agree with the common opinion — this game is significantly better with a group.

The game perfectly mixes tension, comedy, and pure panic. One moment you’re carefully collecting scrap and trying to be quiet, the next you’re running for your life from monsters while your friends are screaming and laughing over voice chat. The unpredictable events, weird creatures, and sudden deaths create some of the funniest co-op moments in any game.

However, once you learn most of the monsters and mechanics, it can get repetitive and lose its magic pretty quickly if you play solo or without a regular group. The fun comes mostly from the chaos and reactions of your friends.

If you have people to play with regularly, Lethal Company is an absolute blast and easily one of the best co-op experiences out there. If you mostly play alone, it might feel boring after a few hours.

**Strongly recommended with friends.**  
Perfect party horror game. 👽🔦😂
My only complaint is that I don't have more spook tolerant friends to rope into these sorts of shenanigens.
open noor look in the eye of big spider ,close the door leave the planet teamate died to a landmine thought it was loot fun
Gioco molto esilarante se vengono implementate le mod, il gioco in se rimane intoccabile nulla da dire, manca solo quel pizzico di sale ( le mods ) che rendono il tutto molto più divertente.
This game is awsome,you can play with your friends make funny clips or even have fun with strangers.This game is awsome for chilling or just having fun,Totaly recomended!
I like the car. it go boom sometimes but i like boom. it is look cool. but the worm in i brain sayz it liks da big worm. :)

i once got trapped in a pitch black room with mist being sprayed everywhere, i couldn't find the exit for the life of me and it was the most terrifying thing i've ever experienced while gaming

Lethal is collaborative, chaotic, and way more fun when you find the right group to play with. At some point it stops being about collecting scrap and more about laughing cus it's just so unserious and unpredictable. You can literally die at any second, which somehow makes the game fun because nobody takes it too seriously.
i liked everything about the game pls bring it to xbox so i can play it on there pls i beg of you best game of my life

Scavenging scrap to sell while avoiding monsters trying to kill you... what's not to love? The gameplay always keeps you guessing at every twist and turn, with the occasional laugh sprinkled in.

The only complaint I have is about [spoiler]the Cadaver Growth entity, a tall and infectious fern found always on Adamance, rarely on Dine, and very rarely on Artifice and Rend. Setting aside how aggressive plants make me feel incredibly uneasy, I find that the Growths spread too fast, creating a serious obstacle that often blocks critical paths and discourages exploration.[/spoiler]
Game's very fun, assuming you have friends to organize a private lobby with, because the public lobbies are, quite frankly, insufferable.
fun coop game where you take scap and sell scrap with friends, maybe aliens

In my 40 hours of this game. It is still so fun to play. even with all the hours me and my friends cant get past q3 but there's still so many funny moments. I cant wait for more updates too. Anyway  I'm gonna go play lethal company and get my neck snapped by flower man
I have been killed by my teammates more than the monsters, this is the single most unserious game i have ever played. 10/10
its a really fun game collect scrap and sell and meet the goal
Its a great game, ive enjoyed playing it with people, Playing alone is rather boring though so dont do it :3
Me and my crew went down an elevator on that caves map, turret shot us faster than we could even react, last homie was in the ship waiting for us to return. 10/10
very good game, inspired the entire friendslop genre. only good if you have friends though.
Lethal Company is one of the most entertaining co-op horror games I’ve ever played. It blends suspense, chaos and humour perfectly. It really makes the game feel unpredictable.
gameplay cool, graphics cool, sound cool, cool game

A little rough around the edges at times but the game really leaves itself open to repeat fun even with a simple gameplay loop. 
On top of that the modding community has really helped keep this community going and help continue to create fun experiences with friends.

Lethal Company drops players into a retro-futuristic, atmospheric lo-fi universe where corporate greed meets survival horror. As contracted workers for the Company, players must scavenge abandoned, industrialized moons for scrap metal while navigating terrifying traps, pitch-black corridors, and a hostile menagerie of alien monstrosities lurking in the shadows.

Our 25-hour journey has been an absolute masterclass in pure, unadulterated laughter. While the game markets itself as a survival horror experience, the brilliant proximity voice chat and unpredictable AI turn every single run into a comedic goldmine. Hearing a teammate’s voice suddenly cut out mid-sentence, only to find nothing but their dropped flashlight left behind, delivers an endless loop of hilarious and chaotic moments. It balances its eerie atmosphere perfectly with frantic, accidental comedy, making it a stellar cooperative experience. For anyone looking to test their teamwork while laughing until it hurts, meeting the Company’s profit quota is an absolute must.
Its a very fun game to play with freinds, even better with mods.

this is a rather fun game to play with your friends, with a few jump scare's and an all around good time.

just don't miss the quota...

I watched all my friends get dragged into the depths of hell, kicking and screaming. Lasted maybe a couple more minutes terrified and alone, lost in the dark trying my best to escape. Forget finding their bodies, forget the loot, forget the quota -- I just didn't want to be pulled into the dark with them. I didn't last long.

10/10 fantastic game, and it just keeps getting better :))

Lethal Company is the perfect example of a game where teamwork and panic go hand in hand. What starts as a simple scrap collecting mission usually ends with someone screaming, someone getting lost, and everyone laughing about it afterward. The atmosphere is genuinely tense, but the unpredictable moments and player interactions make it just as funny as it is scary.

This game is peak ngl i played with some of my friends and instantly one of them had like 2 birds on their head, They then proceeded to get kidnapped by birds this game is perfect for coop with the proximity chat just one thing that I have problems with sometimes is when I try to join a public it says an error occurred but thats not too much of a problem.

game is fun with friends; i have played it with and without mods and it is enjoyable no matter what, i would like to see more maps though PLEASE

Also this game is cool, I like the world building so far and I am going to be here until the story is laid out in full and long after. The gameplay loop is fun and multiplayer is always a good time. Thank you Zeekers o7 o7 o7
